svg.text:
"Natural Language Prompts
• Review design at URL
• Compare to reference
• Pick element to edit"

"agent-canvas-setup
─────────────────
• Check Python/uv/Playwright
• Install missing deps
• Validate environment"

"design-review
─────────────────
• Load design specs
• Run compliance checks
• Generate issues by severity
• Create annotated screenshots"

"agent-eyes
─────────────────
• Screenshots
• Accessibility scans
• DOM snapshots
• Element descriptions"

"agent-canvas
─────────────────
• Interactive picker
• Click-to-select UI
• Compliance indicators
• Add to Review workflow"

"canvas-edit
─────────────────
• Live annotation overlay
• Numbered issue badges
• Severity color coding
• Filter by issue type"

"canvas-apply
─────────────────
• Convert edits to code
• Map selectors to files
• Generate CSS/TSX changes"

"canvas-verify
─────────────────
• Before/after comparison
• Visual diff generation
• Confirm fixes applied"

"Spec Loader
─────────────────
• Parse markdown specs
• Support inheritance
• Extract checks"
